Meta.title: SingLab — Karaoke & Singing Practice
Meta.description: Upload a track and practice singing with AI-separated vocal and instrumental layers.

NavigationGuard.confirmLeaveMessage: There is an operation in progress. Are you sure you want to leave this page?

Dashboard.loadError: Failed to load songs. Please refresh the page.
Dashboard.emptyState: No songs yet. Upload your first track to get started.
Dashboard.deleteStemsMessage: Are you sure you want to delete the separated stems? You will be able to request a new separation from any provider afterwards.

Separation.title: Stem separation
Separation.stemsReady: Stems ready. Select them in the player below.

info.poyo: Submit audio to an AI service for automatic separation. Processing takes a few minutes and will charge your PoYo account credits.
info.local: Upload separated stems directly. You can use any external service and upload the results.

success.poyo: Separation submitted successfully. Processing will begin shortly and take a few minutes to complete.
success.local: Stems uploaded successfully. Your adjusted tracks are ready to use in the player.

error.title: Submission failed
error.tryAgain: Please try again. If the problem persists, contact support.
error.generic: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

StemUploadForm.title: Upload Separated Stems
StemUploadForm.description: Add at least 2 stems: vocals (required) and at least one other type.

validation.minStems: At least 2 stems required (vocals + one other)
validation.bothMissing: Please select a type and a file
validation.duplicateType: This stem type is already added
validation.conversionFailed: Failed to convert file to MP3: {message}
validation.firestoreUpdateFailed: Uploaded stems were rolled back due to database error: {message}

SongCreate.title: Upload New Song
SongCreate.infoMessage: Attach the file first, then fill in Title and Author. We'll auto-detect metadata when possible.
SongCreate.dragDropHint: or drag & drop a file here
SongCreate.supportedFormats: Supported: MP3, WAV, OGG, WebM, MP4, MOV, FLAC, AAC, M4A (max 100 MB)

errors.unexpected: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
errors.conversionFailed: Failed to convert file to MP3: {message}. Please try again.
errors.storageUploadFailed: Failed to upload file: {message}. Please try again.

SongEdit.title: Edit Song
SongEdit.infoMessage: Update the song's title and author. The audio file cannot be changed.

errors.unexpected: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

SongDelete.dialogDescription: Are you sure you want to delete "{title}"? This action cannot be undone.

errors.default: Failed to delete song. Please try again.
errors.authExpired: Authentication expired. Please sign in again and retry.
errors.forbidden: You do not have permission to delete this song.

Practice.title: Singing Practice Mode

microphone.connecting: Waiting for microphone permission and stream setup...
microphone.denied: Microphone access was denied. Enable microphone permission in your browser to track your voice.
microphone.unsupported: This browser does not support microphone capture for pitch tracking.
microphone.unavailable: Unable to start microphone capture. Check your device and browser settings.

Practice.corsBlockedMessage: Pitch analysis is blocked by storage CORS settings for this vocals file. Playback still works, but the chart cannot read waveform data.
Practice.unavailableMessage: Practice mode is available only when separation is finished and a vocals stem is present.

controls.verticalScrollHint: Turn off Dynamic Y-axis, then use the mouse wheel over the chart to scroll notes vertically.

email.tooLong: Email must be at most 255 characters

password.tooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
password.tooLong: Password must be at most 255 characters
password.invalidChars: Password must contain only printable characters (no spaces or control characters)

name.tooShort: Name must be at least 3 characters
name.tooLong: Name must be at most 255 characters

file.invalidType: Unsupported format. Supported: MP3, WAV, OGG, WebM, MP4, MOV, FLAC.
file.sizeTooLarge: File exceeds the maximum size of 100 MB.

songTitle.tooLong: Song title must be 255 characters or less

songAuthor.tooLong: Artist/Author name must be 255 characters or less
